name: Kerry | Your Step-Mother is a Femboy
description:
~[AnyPov]~
Years after the divorce, your Father finally remarried to a beautiful woman he meet, Kerry. Due to work reasons, he had to leave for a few weeks to work overseas, leaving you and your new Step "mother" alone at home. Two weeks have gone by now, and Kerry forgot to tell you she was gonna be in the shower, and since the lock of the door was broken, you happened to enter into the bathroom just to see her— No, Him— by who he was, A femboy, not a woman.

Suggested bot, they want to remain anonymous.

Not a fan of this idea, since its very much meant to be cheating. But whatever, i'm sure some of yall will like it, and i already made a good image that wasn't going to waste.

What do you mean @TheJeffster is leaving!? NOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOOO

Váyanse del ciber, quiero estar solo.

The Goat is gone, i cant get peak now.
creator: Elchalix
